name: toggle-group-outline
visual_summary: The toggle-group-outline component is a collection of toggle buttons that display text labels and toggleable states. It's primarily used in settings, preferences, or configuration panels where users need to select from multiple options. This component is often used in navigation, configuration, or customization sections of an application.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready group component with the following characteristics:

Name: toggle-group-outline
Description: The toggle-group-outline component is a collection of toggle buttons that display text labels and toggleable states. It's primarily used in settings, preferences, or configuration panels where users need to select from multiple options. This component is often used in navigation, configuration, or customization sections of an application.
Style: material-design
Interactions: clickable, hover, animatable
Tags: toggle, group, configuration, settings, preferences

Requirements:

- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
